source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/ADD/접수자료/Safety 접수자료 231219/8. 회로도/HAD1417MCW/SCH_HAD1417MCW_GATEIC_BOARD_V1.0.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung proprietary schematic for HAD1417MCW GateIC Board V1.0 / s4335w_r1_set_interface_gate.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product safety or RA submission evidence by documenting circuit schematic details and internal substance-threshold compliance reference.
keyPoints: The schematic set lists sheets including cover sheet, block diagram, power tree, input connectors, signal buffer, AED control signal, VGH_VGL, GateIC pads, ground pad, and thru hole.
The document repeatedly states: "Comply with the threshold of substances which are specified in 0QA-2049".
The schematic is marked Samsung proprietary and states it must not be disclosed or duplicated except as authorized by Samsung.
Visible development step and revision information includes "DA 1.0" and "C1#_R1 GATEIC BOARD V1.0 : 1 0 0 0".

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction is present; authoritySignal is only 'general' and the text primarily identifies Samsung.
Document date is not stated as a single official document date; page timestamps include Feb 09, Feb 10, and Jul 14 2015.
OCR/text quality contains repeated title-block fragments and possible typo 'SAMSUNG ELECTRONIS CO'.
Product model HAD1417MCW is taken from sourcePath rather than a clear title-block field in the extracted text.
